_note: F.5.1+F.5.2 template — copy to .mcp.json (gitignored) and fill env values. Hermes Claude Code MCP wiring.

hermes-gateway._note: F.5.1 ContextForge gateway scaffold. Loopback VM-side; PC consumes via SSH reverse tunnel (F.5.3). OAuth bypass localhost when HERMES_STRICT_MCP=0 (dev). Bearer required when STRICT=1 (prod). F.5.2 wired 3 custom MCPs (hermes-linkedin/prospects/skills) as upstreams active.

_hermes-linkedin._note: F.5.2 scaffold — VM-only execution (depends on linkedin/* + patchright + fastmcp). PC Claude Code accesses via hermes-gateway dispatch, NOT direct spawn. Entry retained com prefix _ pra documentation. Habilitar (remover _) somente se rodar PC com fastmcp + patchright instalados.

_hermes-prospects._note: F.5.2 scaffold — VM-prefer execution (acessa command_center.db). PC Claude Code via hermes-gateway. Habilitar local com fastmcp instalado pra dev.

_hermes-skills._note: F.5.2 scaffold — skills/*.yaml mgmt. Roda VM (skills/ deployed) ou PC (repo skills/ fallback). Habilitar local com fastmcp.
